basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Delhi Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Research Assistant / Project Technical Support II Posts
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi (AIIMS Delhi)
basic_details.post_name: Research Assistant / Project Technical Support II
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi (AIIMS Delhi) Research Assistant / Project Technical Support II Recruitment 2026 has been released on 11 May 2026 on the official website AIIMS Delhi Official Website . A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the AIIMS Delhi Research Assistant / Project Technical Support II Recruitment 2026. Candidates up to 30 years who have a Bachelor's degree in Technology with experience in computer systems and data science are eligible to apply for these Research Assistant / Project Technical Support II vacancies. The email application process for AIIM

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelors degree in Technology with experience in computer systems and data science
qualification.details: Research Assistant / Project Technical Support II: Bachelors degree in Technology with experience in computer systems and data science.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Research Assistant / Project Technical Support II

selection_process: Shortlisting based on application and CV Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for AIIMS Delhi Research Assistant / Project Technical Support II Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 18-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the AIIMS Delhi Research Assistant / Project Technical Support II recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date for submitting your application via email is 18th May 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated email address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Bachelors degree in Technology with relevant experience in computer systems and data science to be eligible for this position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Research Assistant / Project Technical Support II position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for this role is 30 years. There is no minimum age specified in the available data.

faq.question: Q4. How will candidates be selected for the Research Assistant / Project Technical Support II role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves two main stages: initial shortlisting based on your application and CV, followed by an interview for the shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Research Assistant / Project Technical Support II post?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 28,000/- per month for the duration of the contract.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this AIIMS Delhi job?
faq.answer: The application process is entirely through email. Candidates need to send their resume and required documents to the official email address provided in the notification.

faq.question: Q8. How many vacancies are available for the Research Assistant / Project Technical Support II post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the post of Research Assistant / Project Technical Support II in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q9. What is the nature of the job?
faq.answer: The position of Research Assistant / Project Technical Support II is a contract-based job at AIIMS Delhi.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article. It contains all detailed information regarding the recruitment.
